title: Development Startup
description:
Development Startup

Development Startup

Typically, you would perform these steps to start development:

Declare a Spel class variable in a module
	 in your .NET project.

Start Epson RC+ 8.0.

Open the desired Epson RC+ 8.0 project or
	 create a new Epson RC+ 8.0 project.

Build the Epson RC+ 8.0 project.

Add initialization code for the SPEL class
	 instance.

Run and debug the .NET project.
